sys_ui_page.description:
New UI Page to prompt from Platform about deleting Tasks and subtasks - this page is also used for Template and Template Task 2.8.1 | 2022-11-12 | raj | STRY0131195 - Delete OOO Schedule Confirmation Modal Added OOO to the list of objects this page can delete
2.8.0 - 2022-07-09 - raj - STRY0119137 - Stretch- Template UI Clean Up- Delete Top Template Task Confirmation Modal (moved delete to new script) 2.8.0 - 2022-07-09 - raj - STRY0119138 - Stretch- Template UI Clean Up- Delete Template Subtask Confirmation Modal (moved delete to new script)
2.7.0 | 2021-08-28 | mmcc | STRY0107404 - Draft Scheduled Tasks – UI – Delete Modal New UI Page to prompt about Task and subtasks when deleting from Platform 2.7.0 | 2021-09-03 | mmcc | DFCT0010476 - "Acknowledgement Prompt" does not have an "Acknowledge" button so users cannot use Tasker Changed class modal-body to dtech-modal-widget-body; changed footer tag to a div. Changed class dtech-modal-footer to dtech-modal-widget-footer; dropped class flex. 2.7.0 | 2021-09-14 | mmcc | STRY0099532 - DIA- 'Mass Reopen' Task Tree Modal (MVP) Updated styleSheets array to use tasker-modal-prompt-UIPages. Changed CSS Selector .dtech-perm-delete to use .dtech-standard-text-color. Chnaged to use OnCancel() and onSubmit(). 2.7.0 | 2021-09-26 | raj | DFCT0010541- When deleting "Draft Scheduled Tasks", it does NOT redirect anywhere. 2.7.0 | 2021-10-8 | mmcc | STRY0109110 - Draft Scheduled Tasks – UI – Delete Modal- Add Descendant tasks count Using TaskerHelpers().getDescendantsCount(); Messages updated 2.7.0 | 2021-10-18 | mmcc | STRY0108860 - DIA- Completed from Top Task Notification Made params.countType test for 'EXCLUDE_CLOSE'; do not count Completed, Closed Incomplete and Cancelled tasks 2.7.0 | 2021-11-17 | raj | STRY0114416 - 'gr' as a GlideRecord variable name in custom scripts is always a bad idea changed gr to gr_delete_task
sys_ui_page.html:
var styleSheets = []; styleSheets.push("tasker-modal-prompt-UIPages.css"); var linkTags = []; for (var sheet in styleSheets) { var css = new GlideRecord("content_css"); css.addQuery("name", styleSheets[sheet]); css.query(); css.next(); linkTags.push(css.sys_id+".cssdbx?ver="+css.sys_updated_on); } Warning Tasker - You are about to permanently delete this task with all its {0} subtasks Tasker - Are you sure you would like to continue? Tasker - If this task has subtask(s), they will also be deleted cancel Tasker - Button - Delete Task Tasker - You are about to permanently delete a Top Template Task Tasker - This will also delete the entire template with all its {0} template tasks Tasker - You are about to permanently delete this template task with all its {0} template subtasks Tasker - Button - Delete Template Tasker - Button - Delete Scheduled Out Of Office Tasker - Delete a scheduled out of office between {0} and {1} var messageShortDescription = ''; var taskId = jelly.jvar_taskSysId; var templateId = jelly.jvar_templateSysId; var tempTaskId = jelly.jvar_templateTaskSysId; var oooSysId = jelly.jvar_oooSysId; var oooStartDate = jelly.jvar_oooStartDate; var oooEndDate = jelly.jvar_oooEndDate; if(taskId){ messageShortDescription = jelly.jvar_taskNumberShortDescription; } else if(tempTaskId){ messageShortDescription = jelly.jvar_templateTaskNumberShortDescription; } else if(templateId){ messageShortDescription = jelly.jvar_templateNumberShortDescription; } else if (oooSysId){ messageShortDescription = gs.getMessage('Tasker - Delete a scheduled out of office between {0} and {1}', [oooStartDate, oooEndDate]); } messShortDescription = messageShortDescription; var messageCount = ''; var taskCount = 0; var taskId = jelly.jvar_taskSysId; var templateId = jelly.jvar_templateSysId; var tempTaskId = jelly.jvar_templateTaskSysId; var isTopTemplateTask = jelly.jvar_isTopTemplateTask; var useTempMessage = false; if(taskId){ var details = { taskSysId: taskId, countType: 'ALL' }; var taskerHelpers = new TaskerHelpers(); taskCount = taskerHelpers.getDescendantsCount(details); messageCount = gs.getMessage('Tasker - You are about to permanently delete this task with all its {0} subtasks', [taskCount]); } else if(tempTaskId) { if(!isTopTemplateTask){ useTempMessage = false; var taskTemplateHelpers = new TaskTemplateHelpers(); taskCount = taskTemplateHelpers.countTemplateTaskSubTasks(tempTaskId); messageCount = gs.getMessage('Tasker - You are about to permanently delete this template task with all its {0} template subtasks', [taskCount]); } else { useTempMessage = true; } } else if(templateId){ useTempMessage = true; } // if using template message then, build it if(useTempMessage){ var taskTemplateHelpers = new TaskTemplateHelpers(); taskCount = taskTemplateHelpers.countAllTemplateTasks(templateId); messageCount = gs.getMessage('Tasker - This will also delete the entire template with all its {0} template tasks', [taskCount]); } messCount = messageCount; var deleteButtonText = gs.getMessage('Tasker - Button - Delete Task'); var templateId = jelly.jvar_templateSysId; var tempTaskId = jelly.jvar_templateTaskSysId; var isTopTemplateTask = jelly.jvar_isTopTemplateTask; var oooSysId = jelly.jvar_oooSysId; if(oooSysId){ deleteButtonText = gs.getMessage('Delete'); } else if(!tempTaskId){ if(templateId){ deleteButtonText = gs.getMessage('Tasker - Button - Delete Template'); } } messDeleteButtonText = deleteButtonText; var messageTopTaskInfo = ''; var isTopTemplateTask = jelly.jvar_isTopTemplateTask; var oooSysId = jelly.jvar_oooSysId; if(isTopTemplateTask){ messageTopTaskInfo = gs.getMessage('Tasker - Deleting a "Top Template Task" will delete the entire Template'); } else if (oooSysId){ messageTopTaskInfo = ''; } else { messageTopTaskInfo = gs.getMessage('Tasker - If this task has subtask(s), they will also be deleted'); } messTopTaskInfo = messageTopTaskInfo; var messageTopTemplateTask = ''; var isTopTemplateTask = jelly.jvar_isTopTemplateTask; if(isTopTemplateTask){ messageCount = gs.getMessage('You are about to permanently delete a Top Template Task'); } messCount = messageTopTemplateTask;

${gs.getMessage('Warning')}!

${HTML:jvar_shortDescription}
${jvar_messageTopTemplateTask}


${jvar_messageCount}


${gs.getMessage('Tasker - Are you sure you would like to continue?')}


${jvar_messageTopTaskInfo}


${gs.getMessage('cancel')} ${jvar_deleteButtonText}
sys_ui_page.name: tasker_delete_prompt
